meta.description: Cold email templates for website development outreach. 3 scenarios per bucket: no_website, old_website, weak_website. Match scenario based on research before sending.

scenarios.no_website: Business has no website at all — fully on platforms, Instagram, or word of mouth
scenarios.old_website: Business has a website but it looks outdated, slow, not mobile-friendly, or not updated in years
scenarios.weak_website: Business has a website but no SEO, no booking system, no clear CTA, not ranking on Google

meta.usage: Step 1 — match category to bucket. Step 2 — check if business has no website, old website, or weak website. Step 3 — pick the right scenario template. Step 4 — replace all {{variables}} with real data.
rules: No phrases like data-driven, optimize operations, digital transformation
Website is always the primary solution

no_website.subject: {{business_name}} — Patients Are Searching Online and Not Finding You
no_website.body:
Hi {{business_name}} Team,

With a {{rating}} rating and {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}}, your patients clearly trust you. But right now, {{business_name}} has no website — and patients searching for a {{category}} on Google are landing on clinics that do.

That is business leaving before it ever reaches you.

Here is what a website does for your practice:

- Online appointment booking so patients can schedule without calling
- Google visibility for '{{category}} in {{city}}' searches happening right now
- A professional page with services, timings, and reviews that builds trust instantly
- Removes your dependency on Practo or Justdial where you pay per lead

Your reputation is strong. A website makes sure it reaches every patient searching in {{city}}.

Can we get on a 10-minute call this week to show you exactly what this looks like for {{business_name}}?

Best,
{{sender_name}}
{{agency_name}}
{{agency_website}} | {{agency_phone}}

old_website.subject: {{business_name}} — Your Website Is Losing You Patients Right Now
old_website.body:
Hi {{business_name}} Team,

{{business_name}} has a {{rating}} rating with {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}} — strong numbers. But your current website is working against you. Outdated design, no mobile optimization, and no booking system signal to patients that the practice may be equally behind.

First impressions online are instant. Patients decide in seconds.

Here is what a modern website fixes:

- Mobile-friendly design that works perfectly on every phone
- Online appointment booking that reduces missed calls and front-desk load
- Updated service pages and doctor profiles that build immediate confidence
- Google ranking improvement — old sites rarely appear on page one

Your clinic deserves a website that matches the quality of care you actually deliver.

Would a 10-minute call this week work to walk you through what a rebuild looks like for {{business_name}}?

Best,
{{sender_name}}
{{agency_name}}
{{agency_website}} | {{agency_phone}}

weak_website.subject: {{business_name}} — You Have a Website. It Is Just Not Bringing in Patients.
weak_website.body:
Hi {{business_name}} Team,

{{business_name}} has a {{rating}} rating and {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}} — and you already have a website. But if new patients are not finding you through Google, the site is not doing its job.

A website that does not rank is the same as no website for anyone searching today.

Here is what needs to work:

- Local SEO so {{business_name}} appears when patients search '{{category}} in {{city}}'
- An online booking system that converts visitors into confirmed appointments
- Clear service pages and a strong call to action on every page
- Patient reviews integrated into your site to build trust and improve Google ranking

Your existing site is a starting point. We can turn it into a consistent source of new patient enquiries.

Can we take 10 minutes this week to show you specifically what is missing?

Best,
{{sender_name}}
{{agency_name}}
{{agency_website}} | {{agency_phone}}

no_website.subject: {{business_name}} — Instagram Is Not a Website. Here Is Why It Matters.
no_website.body:
Hi {{business_name}} Team,

{{business_name}} has a {{rating}} rating with {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}} — clearly your clients love the experience. But without a website, every booking depends on a platform you do not own. Instagram changes its algorithm. Justdial charges per lead. You have no control.

A professional website changes that entirely.

Here is what it does:

- Direct bookings with zero commission — every payment comes straight to you
- A gallery page where your work sells for you before a client calls
- Google visibility for '{{category}} in {{city}}' searches from ready-to-book clients
- A brand presence that positions {{business_name}} above competitors still only on Instagram

Your work deserves a platform you own and control.

Would a 10-minute call this week work to show you what this looks like for {{business_name}}?

Best,
{{sender_name}}
{{agency_name}}
{{agency_website}} | {{agency_phone}}

{{business_name}} has a {{rating}} rating with {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}} and your work clearly speaks for itself. But your current website is outdated — slow to load, not mobile-friendly, and the design does not match the standard of service you actually deliver.

weak_website.subject: {{business_name}} — Your Website Exists. But Is It Bringing in Clients?

Hi {{business_name}} Team,

{{business_name}} has a {{rating}} rating with {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}} and you already have a website. But if new clients are not booking through it, the site is not converting — and that is a fixable problem.

A website that looks good but does not perform is leaving money on the table.

Here is what needs to change:

- A direct booking button on every page so clients can act immediately
- Local SEO so {{business_name}} ranks when someone searches '{{category}} near me in {{city}}'
- A gallery of your actual work — not stock images — that converts browsers into bookings
- Clear service menu with pricing that reduces enquiry calls and speeds up decisions

Small changes to your existing site can produce a significant increase in direct bookings.

Could we get on a 10-minute call this week to show you exactly what to fix?

Best,

{{agency_name}}

old_website.subject: {{business_name}} — An Outdated Website Can Cost You More Than No Website
old_website.body:
Hi {{business_name}} Team,

{{business_name}} has a {{rating}} rating with {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}} — you have clearly earned trust in your area. But your current website is slow, not mobile-friendly, and looks dated. For a {{category}} business, that signals unreliability to a homeowner deciding who to call.

Customers making quick decisions choose the business that looks most professional online.

Here is what a modern rebuild delivers:

- A fast, mobile-optimised site that loads in under 3 seconds on any phone

Your skills are not in question. Your website should not be either.

{{agency_name}}

weak_website.subject: {{business_name}} — You Have a Website. So Why Are Leads Still Coming from Platforms?

no_website.subject: {{business_name}} — Every Zomato Order Is Costing You More Than You Think
no_website.body:
Hi {{business_name}} Team,

{{business_name}} has a {{rating}} rating with {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}} — your customers are loyal and your food clearly delivers. But without a website, every online order runs through Swiggy or Zomato, and a significant commission leaves before the money reaches you.

Your own website fixes that immediately.

Here is what it does:

- Direct online ordering so customers order from you, not from a platform
- Menu and pricing online that reduces repetitive calls from customers
- Google visibility for '{{category}} in {{city}}' that brings new customers every day
- Customer data you own — for promotions, repeat orders, and loyalty offers

Every order through your website earns you more than the same order through a platform.

Would a quick 10-minute call this week make sense to explore this for {{business_name}}?

Best,
{{sender_name}}
{{agency_name}}
{{agency_website}} | {{agency_phone}}

old_website.body:
Hi {{business_name}} Team,

{{business_name}} has earned a {{rating}} rating with {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}}. You have a website — but if it is slow, hard to navigate on mobile, or lacks an online ordering option, customers who find it are leaving and going straight to Swiggy instead.

A hungry customer will not wait for a slow website.

Here is what a modern rebuild delivers:

- Fast mobile-friendly design that loads instantly and keeps customers on the page
- A built-in online ordering system for direct, commission-free orders

- Google ranking improvement so {{business_name}} appears when people search in {{city}}

Your food is the product. Your website should be selling it, not pushing customers away.

Can we get 10 minutes this week to walk you through what this looks like?

{{agency_name}}

weak_website.subject: {{business_name}} — You Have a Website But Zomato Is Still Getting Your Orders
weak_website.body:
Hi {{business_name}} Team,

{{business_name}} has a {{rating}} rating with {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}} and you already have a website. But if customers are still placing orders through Swiggy or Zomato instead of directly through your site, you are paying commission on revenue your website should be capturing.

Here is what needs to be fixed:

- A direct online ordering system integrated into your existing website
- Local SEO so {{business_name}} ranks when people search '{{category}} near me in {{city}}'
- Clear order-now buttons above the fold on both desktop and mobile
- A Google Business profile linked to your site to dominate local search results

The fix is not a new website — it is making your current one work the way it should.

Could we take 10 minutes this week to identify exactly what to improve on {{business_name}}'s site?

Best,
{{sender_name}}
{{agency_name}}

Hi {{business_name}} Team,

{{business_name}} has a {{rating}} rating with {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}} — your clients trust your expertise. But an outdated website with old design, broken pages, or no mobile formatting quietly signals to new prospects that the firm may not be current with its practices either.

no_website.body:
Hi {{business_name}} Team,

{{business_name}} has a {{rating}} rating with {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}}. But without a website, when someone searches for {{category}} in {{city}} on Google today, you do not show up — and they walk into a competitor's store or order from one with a website.

Foot traffic is declining. Online search is where buying decisions start now.

Here is what a website does for your store:

- A product catalogue or showcase page that drives Google discovery and in-store visits

old_website.body:

{{business_name}} has a {{rating}} rating with {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}} and a website already live. But if it is slow, visually dated, and not optimised for mobile, customers who find it are leaving within seconds and choosing a store with a better-looking site.

weak_website.subject: {{business_name}} — You Have a Website. But Is It Bringing Customers In?
weak_website.body:
Hi {{business_name}} Team,

{{business_name}} has a {{rating}} rating with {{review_count}} reviews in {{city}} and a website that is already live. But if it is not ranking on Google and not generating footfall or direct enquiries, the site is not doing its job.

Here is what is likely holding it back:

- No local SEO — {{business_name}} is not appearing when people search '{{category}} in {{city}}'
- No product showcase or catalogue that gives visitors a reason to visit the store
- No clear call to action — visitors do not know whether to call, visit, or order
- Google Business profile not properly linked and optimised alongside the website

Your store is already good. Your website just needs to start working as hard as you do.

Can we take 10 minutes this week to show you specifically what is missing?

Best,
